lines.english: Bai Ying'ai, what do you like to do on weekends?
I like to play ball and watch TV. How about you?
I like to sing, dance, and also like to listen to music.
You also like to read books, right?
Yes, sometimes I also like to read books.
Do you like to watch movies or not?
I do. I often watch movies on weekends.
In that case, let's go see a foreign movie tonight, how about it? My treat.
Because you treated me to dinner yesterday, so today I'm treating you to a movie.
Then could you also invite Wang Peng and Li You, okay?

example_sentence.cn: 周末我去跳舞, 你去不去?
example_sentence.py: Zhōumò wǒ qù tiào wǔ, nǐ qù bu qù?
example_sentence.en: I'll go dancing this weekend. Are you going?

example_sentence.py: Nǐ de tóngxué qù bu qù dǎ qiú?
example_sentence.en: Are your classmates going to play ball?

vocabulary.definition: to watch, to look, to read

example_sentence.cn: 她今天晚上看不看电视?
example_sentence.py: Tā jīntiān wǎnshang kàn bu kàn diànshì?
example_sentence.en: Is she going to watch TV tonight?

example_sentence.cn: 我常常打球、跳舞、看电视
example_sentence.py: Wǒ chángcháng dǎ qiú, tiào wǔ, kàn diànshì
example_sentence.en: I often play ball, dance, and watch TV

example_sentence.cn: 我常常打球、跳舞、看电视。
example_sentence.py: Wǒ chángcháng dǎ qiú, tiào wǔ, kàn diànshì.
example_sentence.en: I often play ball, dance, and watch TV.
Wang Peng often listens to music on weekends.
Wang Peng often listens to music on weekends.

vocabulary.definition: (a point in) time, moment, (a duration of) time

example_sentence.en: We are going to see a movie tomorrow.
Do you often go to the movies?

example_sentence.cn: 周末我去跳舞,你去不去?
example_sentence.py: Zhōumò wǒ qù tiào wǔ, nǐ qù bu qù?
example_sentence.en: I'll go dancing this weekend. Are you going?

example_sentence.cn: 高文中今天下午五点半去看外国电影。
example_sentence.py: Gāo Wénzhōng jīntiān xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn bàn qù kàn wàiguó diànyǐng.
example_sentence.en: Gao Wenzhong will go to see a foreign movie at 5:30 this afternoon.

vocabulary.definition: to invite someone (to dinner, coffee, etc.), to play the host

Let's go see a movie tomorrow night, OK?

video_global_config.visual_style: Vibrant and clean 3D Pixar animation style, cinematic lighting, warm color palette, high-detail character models and environments.

character_definitions.name: Gao Wenzhong
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A friendly Chinese young man in his early 20s, with short, neat black hair, wearing stylish black-rimmed glasses. Dressed in a casual light blue polo shirt and khaki pants. Expressive and warm facial features.

character_definitions.name: Bai Ying'ai
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A cheerful Chinese young woman in her early 20s, with a chic shoulder-length bob haircut, dark brown hair. Dressed in a fashionable yellow sweater and jeans. Bright, curious eyes and an engaging smile.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 开场，高文中和白英爱在一个明亮的咖啡馆里聊天。高文中友好地询问白英爱的周末爱好。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Medium shot of Gao Wenzhong and Bai Ying'ai sitting opposite each other at a small wooden table in a bright, modern coffee shop with large windows. Sunlight streams in, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. Gao Wenzhong leans forward slightly, smiling as he asks a question. Bai Ying'ai listens attentively. Cinematic, soft focus on the background.

voice_over.content: 白英爱, 你周末喜欢做什么？
voice_over.pinyin: Bái Yīng'ài, nǐ zhōumò xǐhuan zuò shénme?

screen_overlay.main_text: 周末 (zhōumò) 喜欢 (xǐhuan) 做什么 (zuò shénme)？
screen_overlay.sub_text: weekend / to like / to do what?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 白英爱回答时，画面快速切换，生动地展示她打球和看电视的场景。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. A dynamic split-screen effect. On the left, Bai Ying'ai is on a sunny outdoor basketball court, mid-dribble with a determined and happy expression. On the right, she is relaxing on a cozy sofa in a living room, laughing while watching TV. The scene then cuts back to her in the coffee shop, smiling at Gao Wenzhong.

voice_over.content: 我喜欢打球、看电视。你呢？
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan dǎ qiú, kàn diànshì. Nǐ ne?

screen_overlay.main_text: 打球 (dǎ qiú) / 看电视 (kàn diànshì)
screen_overlay.sub_text: to play ball / to watch TV

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中介绍自己的爱好，画面通过蒙太奇展示他唱歌、跳舞和听音乐的快乐瞬间。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. A quick montage sequence. First, Gao Wenzhong is in a colorful KTV room, singing passionately into a microphone. Second, he is in a dance studio with friends, executing a cool hip-hop move. Third, he is sitting on a park bench with headphones on, eyes closed, blissfully enjoying music. Each clip is energetic and joyful.

voice_over.content: 我喜欢唱歌、跳舞, 还喜欢听音乐。
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan chàng gē, tiào wǔ, hái xǐhuan tīng yīnyuè.

screen_overlay.main_text: 唱歌 (chàng gē) / 跳舞 (tiào wǔ) / 听音乐 (tīng yīnyuè)
screen_overlay.sub_text: to sing / to dance / to listen to music

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中向白英爱发出看电影的邀请，表情充满期待。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Back in the coffee shop. Close-up shot on Gao Wenzhong's face, he has a hopeful and inviting expression. He makes a small gesture with his hands as if offering something. The background is softly blurred, focusing all attention on his earnest invitation. Warm, cinematic lighting.

voice_over.content: 那我们今天晚上去看一个外国电影, 怎么样？我请客。
voice_over.pinyin: Nà wǒmen jīntiān wǎnshang qù kàn yí ge wàiguó diànyǐng, zěnmeyàng? Wǒ qǐng kè.

screen_overlay.main_text: 看电影 (kàn diànyǐng) / 我请客 (wǒ qǐng kè)
screen_overlay.sub_text: to watch a movie / my treat

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中解释请客的原因，画面中出现一个回忆气泡，显示昨天白英爱请他吃饭的场景。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Medium shot of Gao Wenzhong explaining. A stylized, slightly transparent thought bubble appears above his head, showing a brief, warm-toned scene of Bai Ying'ai and Gao Wenzhong happily eating at a bustling Chinese restaurant the previous night. The main scene in the coffee shop remains in focus.

voice_over.content: 因为昨天你请我吃饭, 所以今天我请你看电影。
voice_over.pinyin: Yīnwèi zuótiān nǐ qǐng wǒ chī fàn, suǒyǐ jīntiān wǒ qǐng nǐ kàn diànyǐng.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 白英爱笑着提议也邀请王朋和李友，高文中的表情瞬间凝固，显得有些滑稽。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Two-shot. Bai Ying'ai has a sweet, innocent smile. The camera quickly pans to Gao Wenzhong, whose smile freezes into a comical, slightly panicked expression. A classic anime-style sweat drop appears on his forehead. The moment is lighthearted and humorous.

voice_over.content: 那你也请王朋、李友, 好吗？
voice_over.pinyin: Nà nǐ yě qǐng Wáng Péng, Lǐ Yǒu, hǎo ma?

screen_overlay.main_text: 也请 (yě qǐng)... 好吗 (hǎo ma)?
